name: cancelled_appointment_notifications
description: When an appointment is cancelled, creates a follow-up task for scheduling/front-desk staff to rebook the patient, routed to a scheduling team (by configured name) or the appointment's provider, with a comment summarising the original appointment.

handlers.description: Listens for APPOINTMENT_CANCELED and creates a reschedule task (with an appointment-summary comment) for the patient, assigned to the scheduling team or the appointment provider.
